properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let Him turn it in your favor Watch Him work it for your good, he's not done with what He's started, He's not done until it's good

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hello, peace, hello, joy Hello, love, hello, strength Hello, hope, It's a new horizon!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you're ready for a breakthrough, Just open up and just receive, 'Cause what He's pouring out is nothing, You've ever seen, You've ever seen

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fear is not my future You are, You are, Sickness is not my story You are, You are Heartbreak's not my home You are, You are Death is not the end Jesus, You are, You are
